---
title: "clean"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
clean_data <- separate(
  data = data,
  col = NAME,
  into = c("name", "BP", "MF", "systematic_name", "number"), 
  sep = "\\|\\|") 

clean_data[] <- lapply(clean_data, function(x) str_trim(x, side = "both"))

clean_data <- pivot_longer(
  clean_data, 
  cols = G0.05:U0.3,  
  names_to = "sample",  
  values_to = "expression" 
)

clean_data <- separate(
  clean_data, 
  col = sample, 
  into = c("nutrient", "rate"), 
  sep = 1,  # Split at the first character
  convert = TRUE  # Convert to appropriate data types if possible (e.g., numeric)
)

clean_data_df <- clean_data %>%
  mutate(rate = as.numeric(rate),
         expression = as.numeric(expression))
```
